TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Craig Brackins hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa pzyang pkaki' tay kska'. kawas te 1987, byacing te 10 ru 9 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga California, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 208 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 104 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 2010 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu Oklahoma City Thunder. pincyuwagan nya' cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ¶~ ®rai…£ ő≤ra ¶~ ®kins~…ē ńßja Ē…£a nő≤a p…£naw Ē mari Ē mis~…ēuw qanij, qutux s~…ēa pzjaŇč pkaki Ē taj ks~…ēka Ē. kawas~…ē te ****, ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč te ** ru * rjax qu ńßint…£an nja, kinńßulan nja …£a ¶~ ®ali*ornia, ńßija …£a mnanak na ppzuj mari waja, ru s~…ēquliq ka ppkal mari waja. *** kunő≤un kinwa…£iq nja, *** kunkin kin Ēs~…ēuw nja, ńßija …£a qutux nqu s~…ēpzjaŇč ő≤laq na ppzuj mari nő≤a. kawas~…ē **** mnwajaw ppzuj mari …£a, mzjup s~…ēqu te qutux lańßuj ru te ma…£al s~…ēquliq, …£alun nqu oklańßoma ¶~ ®itj tńßun*er. pin ¶~ ®juwa…£an nja Ē ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
S.FORM: Craig Brackins hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa pzyang pkaki' tay kska'. kawas te 1987, byacing te 10 ru 9 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga California, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 208 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 104 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 2010 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu Oklahoma City Thunder. pincyuwagan nya' cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
